nature.label: Nature
nature.description: Nature: a compact research-figure style that prioritizes official constraints.
nature.preset_note: Built around the current public Nature image constraints.

export.accessibility_note: Sans-serif, 5-7 pt text, RGB, vector PDF, avoid red-green conflicts.

acs.label: ACS
acs.description: ACS-inspired compact publication style with Helvetica/Arial lettering and conservative line weights.
acs.preset_note: Approximate ACS/JACS graph metrics: legible small lettering, clear symbols, and lines kept above hairline weight.

export.accessibility_note: Sans-serif, 5-7 pt text, RGB, vector PDF, avoid red-green conflicts.

science.label: Science
science.description: Science/AAAS-inspired compact publication style with restrained strokes and minimal visual decoration.
science.preset_note: Conservative Science-style profile: keep figures simple, readable, and lightly colored.

export.accessibility_note: Sans-serif, 5-7 pt text, RGB, vector PDF, avoid red-green conflicts.

wiley.label: Wiley
wiley.description: Wiley-inspired publication style with slightly roomier text and balanced muted colors.
wiley.preset_note: Approximate Wiley journal figure profile: prioritize readable words and symbols at final figure size.

export.accessibility_note: Sans-serif, 5-7 pt text, RGB, vector PDF, avoid red-green conflicts.

elsevier.label: Elsevier
elsevier.description: Elsevier-inspired publication style centered on 7 pt lettering and uniform artwork proportions.
elsevier.preset_note: Approximate Elsevier graph profile: standard fonts, uniform sizing, and readable line/symbol hierarchy.

export.accessibility_note: Sans-serif, 5-7 pt text, RGB, vector PDF, avoid red-green conflicts.

colorblind_safe.label: Colorblind Safe
colorblind_safe.description: Colorblind-friendly categorical colors with cividis for sequential scales.

deep.label: Deep
deep.description: Seaborn deep: balanced, calm, and broadly useful.

muted.label: Muted
muted.description: Seaborn muted: restrained and soft, suited to multi-group comparisons.

bright.label: Bright
bright.description: Seaborn bright: higher saturation with stronger contrast.

mono.label: Mono
mono.description: Monochrome grayscale: good for analytical figures and black-and-white printing.

infographic.label: Infographic
infographic.description: ECharts-inspired palette with brighter editorial contrast and clean category separation.

roma.label: Roma
roma.description: Soft warm-cool palette inspired by ECharts theme galleries, suited to cleaner comparison figures.

macarons.label: Macarons
macarons.description: Pastel-forward ECharts-inspired palette that stays readable in scientific multi-group charts.

shine.label: Shine
shine.description: Official ECharts Shine palette with high-contrast warm primaries and cooler accents.

vintage.label: Vintage
vintage.description: Official ECharts Vintage palette with warm paper-tone neutrals and restrained contrast.

okabe_ito.label: Okabe-Ito
okabe_ito.description: Okabe-Ito: a classic colorblind-friendly scientific palette.

tol_muted.label: Tol Muted
tol_muted.description: Paul Tol muted: low-stimulation, balanced categorical colors.

materials_warm.label: Materials Warm
materials_warm.description: Warm presentation palette with a stronger materials-showcase feel.

tableau_10.label: Tableau 10
tableau_10.description: Matplotlib Tableau 10 categorical cycle for broad software compatibility.

seaborn_pastel.label: Seaborn Pastel
seaborn_pastel.description: Soft Seaborn pastel cycle for low-contrast categorical figures.

seaborn_dark.label: Seaborn Dark
seaborn_dark.description: Darker Seaborn categorical cycle for stronger contrast on light figure surfaces.

primer_accessible.label: Primer Accessible
primer_accessible.description: GitHub Primer-inspired accessible role colors for technical plots and dashboards.

spectrum_journal_8.label: SciPlot Default 8
spectrum_journal_8.description: Default SciPlot categorical palette: red-orange, orange, teal, sky blue, purple, deep blue, rose, and olive green.

viridis_discrete.label: Viridis Discrete
viridis_discrete.description: Discrete samples from viridis for perceptually ordered categorical sequences.

function_curve.label: Function curve
function_curve.description: Curve plot with bounded analytic function layers sampled from safe math expressions.

point_line.label: Point line
point_line.description: Standard single-panel curve plot with markers.

area_curve.label: Area curve
area_curve.description: Single-panel line chart with a translucent area fill, inspired by ECharts area-line patterns.

step_line.label: Step line
step_line.description: Single-panel step-line chart for abrupt state changes, inspired by ECharts step-line patterns.

stacked_curve.label: Stacked curve
stacked_curve.description: Single-column stacked curves for spectrum-like figures.

stacked_area.label: Stacked area
stacked_area.description: Single-column stacked curves with translucent area fills for layered spectrum-like comparisons.

segmented_stacked_curve.label: Segmented stacked curve
segmented_stacked_curve.description: Wide NMR double-height panel with left/right/bottom alignment and a reserved structure area on top.

bar.label: Bar
bar.description: Statistical bar chart with summary bars and error bars only.

box.label: Box
box.description: Statistical box plot summary without raw-point overlays.

box_strip.label: Box + strip
box_strip.description: Box plot with deterministic strip-point overlay emphasis.

violin_box.label: Violin + box
violin_box.description: Violin distribution with a compact box-summary overlay.

point_error.label: Point + error
point_error.description: Group means as points with deterministic error bars and optional raw-point overlays.

lollipop_error.label: Lollipop + error
lollipop_error.description: Group means as lollipop stems with deterministic error bars and optional raw-point overlays.

histogram_density.label: Histogram density
histogram_density.description: Density-normalized histogram overlays with deterministic smoothed density lines.

density_area.label: Density area
density_area.description: Smoothed distribution density areas with outline overlays for clearer replicate comparisons.

bubble_scatter.label: Bubble scatter
bubble_scatter.description: Single-panel scatter plot with deterministic bubble-size encoding from signal magnitude.

scatter_fit.label: Scatter fit
scatter_fit.description: Single-panel scatter plot with a deterministic linear fit overlay.

mean_band.label: Mean band
mean_band.description: Single-panel curve plot with a replicate mean band overlay.

heatmap.label: Heatmap
heatmap.description: Heatmap with the main frame aligned to standard single-panel plots and an independent top colorbar.

contour_field.label: Contour field
contour_field.description: Scalar field rendered as filled contours from matrix or XYZ-long data.

polar_curve.label: Polar curve
polar_curve.description: Theta-radius data rendered on a polar axis for radial curves and scatter-like traces.

table_figure.label: Table figure
table_figure.description: Compact table output for small data tables and summary command-style figures.

annotated_heatmap.label: Annotated heatmap
annotated_heatmap.description: Heatmap with cell annotations layered on top of the matrix.

single_panel_axis_frame.label: Single-panel axis frame alignment
single_panel_axis_frame.description: Standard single-panel templates must share the same physical axis frame.

wide_nmr_horizontal_alignment.label: Wide NMR left/right/bottom alignment
wide_nmr_horizontal_alignment.description: Wide NMR only requires the left, right, and bottom edges to share anchors with the standard single-panel frame.

wide_nmr_structure_reserve.label: Wide NMR top structure reserve
wide_nmr_structure_reserve.description: Wide NMR must keep a reserved structure area at the top.

wide_nmr_segment_alignment.label: Wide NMR segmented-axis alignment
wide_nmr_segment_alignment.description: Wide NMR segmented axes must share the same top and bottom bounds.

heatmap_main_frame.label: Heatmap main-frame alignment
heatmap_main_frame.description: The heatmap main frame must share the same axis frame as standard single-panel plots.

heatmap_horizontal_colorbar.label: Heatmap top horizontal colorbar
heatmap_horizontal_colorbar.description: Heatmaps must use a top horizontal colorbar without squeezing the main frame.

heatmap_colorbar_inside_canvas.label: Heatmap colorbar inside canvas
heatmap_colorbar_inside_canvas.description: The heatmap colorbar and z label must stay fully inside the canvas.

non_blank_pdf.label: Non-blank exported PDF
non_blank_pdf.description: Every exported PDF must contain visible content and rasterize correctly.

multi_output_bundle_notice.label: Multi-output notice
multi_output_bundle_notice.description: Multi-output bundles should warn how many files will be exported.

dense_group_label_warning.label: Dense group-label warning
dense_group_label_warning.description: Statistical plots should warn that x-axis labels may become crowded when many groups are present.
